title: Accept PR 295 CodeQL suggestions
description: Apply all CodeQL/code-quality review suggestions on PR #295 directly on develop, then run focused checks and push.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applied all seven PR #295 CodeQL/code-quality comments directly on develop. Focused Tactus runtime tests passed: 113 passed. py_compile passed for all touched Python files. flake8 E9/F63/F7/F82 passed. Standalone private-graphql-proxy tests still require that service's own dependency/PYTHONPATH setup.
